message:
fix(analysis,tui): stabilize graph test timestamps and update snapshots

Strips generated_at timestamps from JSON before comparison in graph
analysis tests to eliminate non-deterministic test failures.

Updates 18 TUI snapshots to reflect recent parallel track overview
rendering changes including priority labels (P0-P3), restructured
lane display with box-drawing characters, and adjusted tree view
formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
